agents.name: gemini-mechanics
agents.prompt:
You are a game design expert. List exactly 3 core mechanics for a roguelike card game.

Format:
1. [Mechanic Name] — [One sentence description]
2. [Mechanic Name] — [One sentence description]
3. [Mechanic Name] — [One sentence description]

Output ONLY the 3 items above. No intro, no outro, no explanation.

agents.name: codex-content
agents.prompt:
You are a game design expert. List exactly 3 card types for a roguelike card game.

Format:
1. [Card Type] — [One sentence description]
2. [Card Type] — [One sentence description]
3. [Card Type] — [One sentence description]

Output ONLY the 3 items above. No intro, no outro, no explanation.

agents.name: claude-synthesis
agents.prompt:
You are a game design director reviewing two AI workers' outputs.

Step 1: Read these files:
- subagent-runs/mixed/test-3way-v2/gemini-mechanics.last.txt
- subagent-runs/mixed/test-3way-v2/codex-content.last.txt

Step 2: Synthesize both into a single game concept paragraph in Korean (3-5 sentences). Include a game title.

Step 3: End with verdict:
- ACCEPTED if both inputs contained usable game design content
- MATERIAL_ISSUES if either was empty, generic, or off-topic
